quality.data_completeness: High. Contains slug, name, type, rarity, attunement requirement, description, and source confirmation.
quality.description_clarity: Excellent. Directly states the mechanical effect (action to cast levitate at will).

mechanics.core_effect: While worn, the user can use an action to cast the *levitate* spell on themselves at will.
mechanics.action_economy: This item requires an action to activate the effect, which is standard for 'at will' item spell casting unless specified otherwise (like bonus action or passive).
